entity.summary: Uniswap V3-style concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange with current liquidity across Arbitrum and Base and non-zero recent swap volume.
entity.notes: Current DefiLlama data reports non-zero TVL across Arbitrum and Base together with non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. The current protocol registry also links the CrescentSwap project social identity. A stable first-party application URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: CrescentSwap project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used for identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: CrescentSwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies CrescentSwap as a CLMM DEX, reports TVL on Arbitrum and Base, and reports non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: CrescentSwap Uniswap V3 registry configuration
evidence.notes: Current concentrated-liquidity registry configuration corroborates the CrescentSwap protocol identity and tracked deployment infrastructure.
